title: Twitch CEO Dan Clancy announces stricter action against viewbotting
summary_full: Twitch is implementing a new system to combat viewbotting, a practice where streamers artificially inflate viewer numbers. Starting in May, repeat offenders will face concurrent viewership caps based on their real traffic, with penalties escalating for persistent violations. The platform aims to create a fairer environment for legitimate creators by addressing fake engagement.
